field.label: Make Page H1 Tag
field.comment: Enter H1 Tag you want where you can include dynamic make like this {make}. for example : Buy {make} Tyres

field.label: Model Page H1 Tag
field.comment: Enter H1 Tag you want where you can include dynamic make and model like this {make} {model}. for example : Buy {make} {model} Tyres Online at Best Price in UAE

field.label: Make Page Default Meta Title
field.comment: Enter Default Meta Title you want where you can include dynamic make like this {make}. for example : Buy {make} Car Tires Online at Best Price UAE

field.label: Make Page Default Meta Keywords
field.comment: Enter Default Meta Keywords you want where you can include dynamic make like this {make}. for example : {make}, car tires, {make} car tires, {make} vehicle tires, premium tires, high-performance tires, luxury car tires, {make} tire selection

field.label: Make Page Default Meta Description
field.comment: Enter Default Meta Description you want where you can include dynamic make like this {make}. for example : Shop premium {make} car tyres in UAE

field.label: Model Page Default Meta Title
field.comment: Enter Default Meta Title you want where you can include dynamic make like this {make}. for example : Buy {make} Car Tires Online at Best Price UAE

field.label: Model Page Default Meta Keywords
field.comment: Enter Default Meta Keywords you want where you can include dynamic make like this {make}. for example : {make}, car tires, {make} car tires, {make} vehicle tires, premium tires, high-performance tires, luxury car tires, {make} tire selection

field.label: Model Page Default Meta Description
field.comment: Enter Default Meta Description you want where you can include dynamic make like this {make}. for example : Shop premium {make} car tyres in UAE
